substep.title: Load Angle Table
substep.action: Load references/codesmith/verification-angle-table.md. The "Mandatory angles × gate matrix" + "Conditional angles" tables define which angles apply per gate.

substep.title: Pick Mandatory Angles
substep.action:
From the mandatory × gate matrix, select the columns marked ✓ for {{gate}}:
- D-review: architecture, sizing - P-review: plan-adherence, sizing, completeness-vs-ac - I-per-slice: plan-adherence, code-quality, test-quality - final-integration: plan-adherence, code-quality, test-quality, architecture, completeness-vs-ac
Store as {{mandatory_angles}}.

substep.title: Evaluate Conditional Triggers
substep.action:
For each conditional angle, check its trigger condition against this gate's context:
- security: if primary_tag IN ('feature', 'hotfix') OR 'security' IN tags OR I-phase signaled an auth/credential/ data-exposure code path → add - performance: if 'performance' IN tags OR I-phase signaled a hot-path → add - compliance: if 'compliance' IN tags OR touched code is in a regulated module per ADR → add - operational: if primary_tag == 'infrastructure' OR I-phase touched logging/monitoring/error paths → add - documentation: if gate IN ('I-per-slice') AND CONTEXT.md was touched → add; OR if gate == 'final-integration' → always add - dependency: if package.json / Cargo.toml / pyproject.toml / equivalent was modified in the slice or plan → add
Store added angles as {{conditional_angles}}.
Combined: {{angle_set}} = mandatory_angles + conditional_angles.
